purpose: Strict offline CSV parsing of one exact M7e validated caller-supplied body.
provenance: The fixture proves deterministic parser and result semantics only; no provider transport or physical attempt occurred.

cases.description: A header plus one LF-terminated data row is parsed without type inference so the station identifier retains its leading zeroes.

expectation.note: The exact all-character table is non-authoritative and remains bound to a caller-supplied M7e candidate.
